title: ANGIX 6 x 2000ml Plastic Storage Jars & Canisters with Screw Top Lids, Airtight Food Storage Containers for Kitchen, Food, Spices, Herbs & Sweets, Clear Canister Pots
features: ✅ Multiple Sizes Available for All Your Storage Needs

✔ 2000ml Plastic Storage Jars with Red Screw Top Lids :- Each plastic canister comes with a durable red screw lid for secure storage. These 2000ml plastic storage jars with lids are ideal for organising food, spices, herbs, or sweets in any kitchen.

✔ Odour Proof, Leak Proof & Airtight Storage Jars :- Made with a tight screw-top seal, these airtight storage jars prevent leaks and keep contents fresh. Use these storage jars with lids airtight for sugar, tea, coffee, and dry goods without worrying about odours.

✔ High-Grade, Unbreakable Plastic Jars for Daily Use :- Crafted from high-quality, heavy-duty plastic, these storage jars plastic are built to last. They’re durable, unbreakable, and perfect food storage containers for daily kitchen, pantry, or festival prep.

✔ Multi-Purpose Plastic Canisters :- This pack includes 6 clear plastic storage canisters, each with a 2000ml capacity (10cm diameter x 21cm high). Perfect for storing spices, sweets, lentils, pasta, cereals, or for gifting during UK events and holidays.

✔ Easy to Use & Clean :- These plastic jars with lids are transparent for easy viewing and organisation. Lightweight, reusable, and easy to clean, these food storage canisters are ideal for homes, parties, or small businesses.
